features: Keep track of what has been taken
Displays day and AM or PM
Perfect for travel Approximate measurements: 18cm x 9cm x 3cm
description: Product description From the Travel Essentials range comes this handy pill box set This 7 day organiser helps arrange daily doses Also helps to keep track of what has been taken Each section displays day and AM or PM for easy referral The clip lids ensure safe storage and easy removal of pills Handy for use at home and perfect size for travel A convenient & essential item Approximate measurements: 18cm x 9cm x 3cm Directions Load pills into the compartments according to your medication schedule. Use the day and AM/PM indicators to take your medication at the designated times. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if you have difficulty handling small parts. Always open and close the dispenser carefully to avoid injury. Do not use for any purpose other than storing and organizing pills. Dispose of properly after use. See more
